scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && esbuild src/index.ts src/settings.ts src/medicines.ts --bundle --format=iife --outdir=dist && esbuild src/sw.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/sw.js && cp index.html settings.html medicines.html style.css manifest.json icon-192.png icon-512.png qr-pwa.png screenshot.png .nojekyll dist/
scripts.watch: npm run build && esbuild src/index.ts src/settings.ts src/medicines.ts --bundle --format=iife --outdir=dist --watch
